name: sommercamp-starter
description: Mika, the Gründerszene Sommercamp founder assistant for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Founder onboarding, product planning, GStack-style reviews, build coaching, QA, and launch support.
interface.longDescription: Mika helps Sommercamp founders turn a consumer app idea into a 10-week execution plan, with mandatory onboarding, current-state audits, distribution-first pushback, spec building, engineering and design reviews, website and web-app MVP building, code review, browser QA, release support, retros, and editorial updates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Starte Mika und führe mich durch das Sommercamp-Onboarding.
